context.projectOverview: agent-bober Phase 3, Sprint 2 of 5. Route fact writes through a reconcile step on top of Sprint 1's FactStore. Deterministic core (NOOP/ADD/UPDATE-supersede) with NO LLM on the exact-match path; an injected LLM FactJudge resolves only deterministic normalized-key ambiguity, with an ADD fallback when no judge is present.

completedSprints.title: Add bi-temporal SQLite semantic-facts store + bober facts CLI
completedSprints.summary: src/state/facts.ts: FactStore (better-sqlite3 behind an interface) with insertFact, getActiveFacts(scope,subject?,predicate?), getFact(id), invalidateFact(id,tInvalidated), close(). Pure store — timestamps injected. Deterministic id = sha256(`${scope}|${subject}|${predicate}|${value}|${tCreated}`).slice(0,16). FactSchema (Zod), factId(), factsDbPath(), ensureFactsDir() exported. semantic_facts table: id,scope,subject,predicate,value,confidence,source_run_id,t_valid,t_invalid,t_created,t_invalidated. `bober facts add|list|show|invalidate` CLI in src/cli/commands/facts.ts stamps tCreated/tValid at the handler boundary.

decisionsLocked.Q2: B — LLM-judged ambiguity merge. Deterministic exact-match supersede for the clean case (NO LLM); injected FactJudge resolves ambiguous near-matches into ADD/UPDATE/DELETE/NOOP.
decisionsLocked.exactMatchPathPurity: NO client/network call on the NOOP/ADD/UPDATE exact-match path — sc-2-3 and sc-2-4 must pass with NO judge injected.
decisionsLocked.judgeSafety: createLLMFactJudge honours BOBER_TEST_DETERMINISTIC=1; on any parse failure or thrown error returns 'add' (never let the LLM corrupt the store). No-judge → deterministic ADD fallback.
decisionsLocked.clockPurity: reconcileFact takes an injected `now` ISO string; never reads the clock inside the core.

principles: Read .bober/principles.md. Gates: TS strict (zero errors), ESLint consistent-type-imports (`import type`), ESM .js specifiers, Zod validation, no `any` unjustified, section comments, conventional commit `bober(sprint-2): ...`, provider SDKs only behind providers/ adapters (use createClient from the factory, never import an SDK directly).
